title: Basic CSV Join Implementation
description: Initial implementation of CSV file joining with basic DSL support

dsl.description: Simple JSON-based query format for defining joins
features: Primary key specification for join operations
Basic merge policies: First Match, Last Match
File reader using Polars for efficient CSV parsing
Schema detection and column type inference
Basic join engine using HashMap-based lookups

cli_interface.description: Command line interface for basic operations
features: Accept input CSV files as arguments
Load DSL query from JSON file
Write result to output CSV file

wasm_preparation: Design library interface that can be exposed to WASM
Separate CLI logic from core engine logic
Use wasm-bindgen compatible types for public API
Test compilation to WASM target after basic implementation
success_criteria: CLI can join 2 CSV files using simple DSL
Code compiles to WASM target without errors
